text_block_list.text:
It's the first day of our training in preparation for
the Champions Cup.

The scheduled start time comes and goes, but
Smart Falcon is nowhere to be seen.

I don't think she's simply playing hooky. In fact, I
have an idea of where she might be...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Gyah! Trainer?! What are you doing h—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ahem! ☆ I mean, you found me!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry I skipped training! But... I just didn't
know what to do.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...I'm not sure. It's my problem, after all.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But... I guess it might be all right to share my
worries with you...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So, um... Do you remember when that girl told me
I was sparkly a while back?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Pigtails
text_block_list.text:
I love all your songs! And how you sparkle when
you dance!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Pigtails
text_block_list.text: I want to sparkle just like you when I grow up!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Well, the thing is... lately, I don't feel like I've got
that sparkle.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Even when I'm onstage, it's like I'm not having any
fun at all.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I bet you're surprised, right? After all, my
concerts have been great.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
They've been perfect, even. I win... I sing... I
dance... I win again...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I've built up plenty of excitement and dominated
the trending topics.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The concerts have been full of cheering people
and brilliant lights... And the stage of my dreams
only feels a little ways off.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But... it's like something's changed deep down.
Like I'm not the same person who had that dream.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Even though my dream to become the top
Umadol on dirt is just about to come true. It's
funny, isn't it...

There's never been more hype surrounding dirt
racing. At the JBC Classic, Oi Racecourse was
practically bursting at the seams.

Thanks to Smart Falcon's hard work, her dream of
becoming the top Umadol on dirt is steadily
becoming reality.

But it looks like somewhere along the way, her
heart may have fallen out of it.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Is this what they call "getting cold feet"?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Like, if you're too happy, you actually get really
anxious. Haha... suffering from success, right?
choice_data_list: You don't have to push yourself to smile.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: You've got to face it head-on.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Face what? I don't get it...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I should be on top of the world! The dream that
seemed so far off is now within my reach...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You know what it is. To become the top Umadol
on dirt.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've been winning all these races. The
more I win, the higher I rise... towards the to—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Hold on... Is that what the top means to me?
Just winning?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
No, that can't be right... My dream is to be a top
Umadol who... who...
choice_data_list: I have a favor to ask.
I have a favor to ask.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: A favor?
choice_data_list: Can you perform for me right now?
Can you perform for me right now?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ahem.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hiii! ♪ It's me, Smart Falcon! ☆ Taking flight
gracefully from a cliff's edge!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Aha. This feels... awkward. Anyway, um... hope
you enjoy.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hm-hmm. ♪ Here we... go?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Um, ehe. I was waiting for the chant...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Perfect! ☆ Next, let's do it to an eight beat!
choice_data_list: Who do we love? Lovely Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Beautiful! I'm gonna shift it up a gear too!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huff... You too, Trainer. Thanks for going all out with the cheering! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, your smile was suuuper awesome! Enough
to make me get serious! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That took me back to the day we first met.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There wasn't a single person in the audience back
then. Even so, I would sing and dance every day,
rain or shine.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I never once thought about giving up. Because
whatever happened, I...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That's right. I... wanted to shine like a star!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
To shine just like the girls I'd seen on stage...
brighter than even the spotlights above me...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: And to yell "Here I am!" at the top of my lungs!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...How could I be so stupid? I forgot what's most
important to me.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I got so caught up in making dirt races more
popular, it was all I could think about. I told
myself it was all up to me, when it was never my
responsibility in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...I've been the worst Umadol.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: It is! All I've been doing is just standing onstage.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I lost sight of the feelings I wanted to share with
my fans...
choice_data_list: But your light still reached them.
But your light still reached them.

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan A
text_block_list.text: Gooo! Yeaaah, Falcooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Falcooo!
Way to gooo!

When Smart Falcon performs, it inspires her fans
to wave their lights with all their hearts. If she
wasn't shining, the audience would be a sea of
black.

The fact that those lights have gotten brighter
and brighter is proof that she's shining.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All their lights...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Only my fans could tell me if that's really—
choice_data_list: Your first fan is telling you so.
Your first fan is telling you so.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Aha... That's right. You're right.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I'll try and believe in myself... at least
a little.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey! You know to call me Falco! ☆ ...Hehe.

Illuminated by the evening light, something
glistens momentarily in Smart Falcon's eyes. I
pretend not to notice the sparkling droplet as it
falls to the ground.
